titleStmt.title: SII 23.110: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 110. (A.R. No. 110 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Kīri-Kṛishṇaṉ temple—on the same wall Jat. Kulaśēkhara I: year 2: 1191-92 A.D.

summary.p: This begins with introduction Pūdala maḍandai etc. It confirms the grant of some land free of kaḍamai (tax) at a place called Koḷḷiviḷāgam, which had been made for offerings to the deity in the temple of Nālāyira-Viṇṇagar-Emberumāṉ in the time of “Periya-Nāyanār” Śrīvallabhadēvar by the Nagarattār community of Kshatriyaśikhāmaṇipuram in Muḷḷi-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūtalamaṭantai pukaḻoṭum poliya vetamun tamiḻumeṉmai yiṉ viḷa
ṅka kaṟpuṭaṉ tirumakaḷ poṟpuyattiruppat tikkirunāṉkuñ cakkara vāḷañ cūḻum puvaṉa
meḻuṅ kavitta veṇkuṭai niḻal ceṅkolnaṭappa nāṭoṟum tavamu nāyaṟum valaṅkoḷ Āṭaka
p poruppil Aracu miṉiruppa cuntaramārvilintiraṉ pūṭṭiya Āramumalaṅka lum Aḻakuṭaṉ tikaḻa
viṉaiyum puliyumvilluñ curampuka Āṉai maṉṉavar raṭimalar cūṭi marapil vanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi
viḷaṅkiya maṇiyaṇi virasiṁhāsanattu Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟiru
ntaruḷiya koccaṭaiyavaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī kulaceykara devaṟ
ku yāṇṭu 2vatu muḷḷināṭṭu brahmadeyam śrī rājarājaccaturveti maṅkalattu teṉpiṭākai kalla
ṭaikuṟicci nālāyiraviṇṇakar Emperumāṉukku Amitipaṭi celvatāka Innāṭṭu kattiriyacikā
maṇipurattu nakarattom muṉpu periyanāyaṉār śrī vallavadevar kālattil Inakarame kaṭamaiyiṟu
ppomāka kaṭamaiyuṭpaṭa dhanmadāṉam paṇṇi tiruppaṭiyil niraṭṭikuṭutta nilam puṉālil Eḻuvakoḷḷi
viḷākattu Innilattukku perunāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻellai koṭṭaṅ kālpāṟaikku meṟkiṭṭu vaṭakku nokki poṉa
kālukku meṟkum teṉṉellaip pāṟaikkum vaṭakkum kuṭavāyeṟaṭṭi kālukkum vaṭavellai kiḻakku nok
ki poṉa kālukku teṟkum Āka Ipperunāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilam 100 can=tirātittavaṟ Amitapaṭi celvatāka kaṭamaiyu
ṭpaṭa niroṭu dhanmadāṉam paṇṇi kuṭuttom kattiriya cikāmaṇipurattu nakarattom Ivvemperumāṉukku .
Digital edition of SII 23.110 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
